rulings.Case Title: AMY SIU PING CHAN ET AL VS. JIM K FUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Authority For Referee To Retain Legal Counsel And For Issuance Of Order To Show Cause And For Appointment Of The San Francisco Sherriff To Assist Referee
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 26, 2017 line 1. AMY HARRINGTON's Motion For Authority For Referee To Retain Legal Counsel And For Issuance Of Order To Show Cause And For Appointment Of The San Francisco Sherriff To Assist Referee GRANTED. HEARING REQUIRED regarding setting the OSC date, authority allowing the Court to appoint Sheriff to assist the referee, and the Sheriff's exact involvement/role in assisting the referee. No opposition filed.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVE RYAN VS. MITCHELL ROSENFELD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Personal Representative For Deceased Defendant Allen J. Chung And Granting Leave To File Supplemental Complaint; And Supporting Memorandum
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 26, 2017 line 2. PLAINTIFF STEVE RYAN's Motion For Order Substituting Personal Representative For Deceased Defendant Allen J. Chung And Granting Leave To File Supplemental Complaint OFF CALENDAR for failure to comply with SFLR 2.7B.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRECKENRIDGE PROPERTY FUND 2016, LLC VS. CHRIS NORRIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; Req. For Production Of Documents, Set One And Award Of Monetary Sanctions Christopher Hart
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 26, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF BRECKENRIDGE PROPERTY FUND 2016, LLC's Motion Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; Req. For Production Of Documents, Set One And Award Of Monetary Sanctions Christopher Hart GRANTED with sanctions in the amount of $926.34 against Christopher Hart, payable within 10 days of notice of entry of this order, subject to opposition.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 26, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs MARIELLA MORALES and JASON CHA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR - first amended complaint on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE HENRY AND FRANCES GAGE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. DAVID BUCKLEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 26, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT DAVID BUCKLEY's Motion To Quash Summons DENIED without prejudice for failure to comply with CCP § 1167.4(a).= (501/REQ)
